rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There is no Azure DevOps organization configured, and the git remote points to GitHub (`https://github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra.git`).

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need either:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL configured
2. A repository with an Azure DevOps remote

Please provide the Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`) and optionally the project and repository name where you want to query pull requests.
